---
title: "Codes for reproducing the results in the manuscript"
output: html_notebook
date: 20260422
author: Fajin Li
email: lifajin@westlake.edu.cn
---

## 01. Reads Statisitcs and in-frame ratios

```{r}
reads_num <- na.omit(read.table("./SourceData/ReadsNum.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F,sep = "\t"))
reads_ratio <- na.omit(read.table("./SourceData/ReadsRatio.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F,sep = "\t"))
library(ggpubr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggplotify)
library(eoffice)
library(reshape2)

reads_num_plot <- reads_num[,c(5:ncol(reads_num))]
reads_num_plot.melt <- melt(reads_num_plot)
p1 <- ggboxplot(reads_num_plot.melt,x="variable",y="value",color="variable",palette = "nejm",add="jitter")+labs(x="",y="Reads Number")
print(p1)
ggsave('Reads_number_all_sample.pdf',plot=p1,width=10,height=6.5)
ggsave('Reads_number_all_sample.png',plot=p1,width=10,height=6.5)
# topptx(p1,"Reads_number_all_sample.pptx",width = 10,height = 6.5)


reads_ratio_plot <- reads_ratio[,c(5:ncol(reads_ratio))]
reads_ratio_plot.melt <- melt(reads_ratio_plot)
p2 <- ggboxplot(reads_ratio_plot.melt,x="variable",y="value",color="variable",palette = "nejm",add="jitter")+labs(x="",y="Reads Ratio")
print(p2)
ggsave('Reads_Ratio_all_sample.pdf',plot=p2,width=10,height=6.5)
ggsave('Reads_Ratio_all_sample.png',plot=p2,width=10,height=6.5)
# topptx(p2,"Reads_Ratio_all_sample.pptx",width = 10,height = 6.5)




inframe_ratio <- read.table("./SourceData/in_frame_ratio.txt",header = T,row.names = 1,sep = "\t",stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F)
inframe_ratio_plot <- inframe_ratio
inframe_ratio_plot.melt <- melt(inframe_ratio_plot)
p3 <- ggboxplot(inframe_ratio_plot.melt,x="variable",y="value",color="variable",palette = "nejm",add="jitter")+labs(x="",y="Ratio of in-frame reads")
my_comparisons <- list(c("Frame0", "Frame1"),c("Frame0","Frame2"),c("Frame1","Frame2"))
p3 = p3 + stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons,size = 8,method = "wilcox.test")
print(p3)
ggsave('InframeReads_ratio_all_sample.pdf',plot=p3,width=10,height=6.5)
ggsave('InframeReads_ratio_all_sample.png',plot=p3,width=10,height=6.5)
# topptx(p3,"InframeReads_ratio_all_sample.pptx",width = 10,height = 6.5)
```

## 02. Reads length

```{r}
reads_length <- na.omit(read.table("./SourceData/Reads_length.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F,sep = "\t",row.names = 1))
reads_length <- as.data.frame(t(reads_length))
sampleInfo <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_info.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F,sep = "\t")
reads_length <- reads_length[sampleInfo$SRRID,]
reads_length <- reads_length[,order(colnames(reads_length))]
# write.table(reads_length,"Reads_length_stastics.txt",quote = F,row.names = T,col.names = T,sep = "\t")
library(ggpubr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggplotify)
library(eoffice)
library(reshape2)
library(RColorBrewer)

reads_length_plot <- reads_length
reads_length_plot.melt <- melt(reads_length_plot)
p4 <- ggboxplot(reads_length_plot.melt,x="variable",y="value",color="variable",palette = "npc")+labs(x="",y="Reads Number")
print(p4)
ggsave('Reads_length_all_sample.pdf',plot=p4,width=10,height=6.5)
ggsave('Reads_length_all_sample.png',plot=p4,width=10,height=6.5)
# topptx(p4,"Reads_length_all_sample.pptx",width = 10,height = 6.5)
```
## 03. PCA for gene-level and transcript-level RPKM
```{r}
all_sample_info <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_info.txt",sep="\t",stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F,header = T)
all_sample_gene_level_CDS_RPKM <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_gene_level_CDS_RPKM_selected.txt",header = T,sep = "\t",stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F)
all_sample_trans_level_CDS_RPKM <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_trans_level_CDS_RPKM_selected.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,sep = "\t",check.names = F)
trans_data <- all_sample_trans_level_CDS_RPKM
gene_data <- all_sample_gene_level_CDS_RPKM[which(all_sample_gene_level_CDS_RPKM$gene_id%in%all_sample_trans_level_CDS_RPKM$gene_id),]
gene_data["trans_id"] <- trans_data[match(gene_data$gene_id,trans_data$gene_id),3]
gene_data["gene_name"] <- trans_data[match(gene_data$gene_id,trans_data$gene_id),2]
library(dplyr)
gene_data <- select(gene_data,gene_id,gene_name,trans_id,everything())

rownames(trans_data) <- trans_data$gene_id
rownames(gene_data) <- gene_data$gene_id
trans_data <- trans_data[gene_data$gene_id,]


plot.pca=function(data,group){
  colnames(group)=c("ID","Groups")
  ID=unique(as.vector(group$ID))
  subdata=subset(data,select=ID)
  subdata=log2(subdata)
  subdata=t(na.omit(subdata))
  data.pca = prcomp(subdata,scale. = TRUE)
  summary(data.pca)
  pca=as.data.frame(data.pca$x)
  pca$ID=rownames(pca)
  pca=merge(pca,group,by="ID")
  percent1=sprintf("%.1f%%",data.pca$sdev[1]^2/sum(data.pca$sdev^2)*100)
  percent2=sprintf("%.1f%%",data.pca$sdev[2]^2/sum(data.pca$sdev^2)*100)
  xlabel=paste("PC1 (",percent1,")")
  ylabel=paste("PC2 (",percent2,")")
  
  p <- ggscatter(pca,x="PC1",y="PC2",color="Groups",
                 ellipse=F,ellipse.type='confidence',show.legend.text=F, size=3, 
                 font.label=c(8,"plain","black")) + 
    theme_bw() + 
    xlab(xlabel)+ylab(ylabel)+
    guides(color=guide_legend(title="Sample type"), fill=F) + 
    theme(axis.text=element_text(size=12,color='black'),
          axis.title=element_text(size=12,color='black'),
          legend.title=element_text(size=12,color='black'),
          legend.text=element_text(size=12,color='black'))
  return(p)
}


library(ggpubr)
library(ggrepel)
library(eoffice)
sample_info <- all_sample_info[,c("SampleID","Condition")]
plot.data <- gene_data
plot.data[plot.data==0] <-NA
gene_level_RPKM.pca <- plot.pca(plot.data[,-1],sample_info)
print(gene_level_RPKM.pca)
ggsave('gene_level_RPKM.pca.pdf',plot=gene_level_RPKM.pca,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('gene_level_RPKM.pca.png',plot=gene_level_RPKM.pca,width=8.5,height=7.5)
# topptx(gene_level_RPKM.pca,"gene_level_RPKM.pca.pptx",width=8.5,height=7.5)


plot.data <- trans_data
plot.data[plot.data==0] <-NA
trans_level_RPKM.pca <- plot.pca(plot.data[,-1],sample_info)
print(trans_level_RPKM.pca)
ggsave('trans_level_RPKM.pca.pdf',plot=trans_level_RPKM.pca,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('trans_level_RPKM.pca.png',plot=trans_level_RPKM.pca,width=8.5,height=7.5)
# topptx(trans_level_RPKM.pca,"trans_level_RPKM.pca.pptx",width=8.5,height=7.5)

```


## 04. correlation of log2FC of gene-level and transcript-level RPKM
```{r}
library(dplyr)
gene_level_RPKM_log2FC <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_gene_level_CDS_RPKM_log2FC.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,sep = "\t",check.names = F)
trans_level_RPKM_log2FC <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_trans_level_CDS_RPKM_log2FC.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,sep = "\t",check.names = F)
longest_trans_info <- read.table("./SourceData/longest.transcripts.info.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,sep = "\t",check.names = F)
all_trans_info <- read.table("./SourceData/all.transcripts.info.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,sep = "\t",check.names = F)
log2FC_sample_info <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_treatment_conditions_log2FC.txt",header = T,sep = "\t",stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F)

gene_level_RPKM_log2FC <- gene_level_RPKM_log2FC[,c("gene_id",log2FC_sample_info$SampleID)]
trans_level_RPKM_log2FC <- trans_level_RPKM_log2FC[,c("transcript_id",log2FC_sample_info$SampleID)]
trans_level_RPKM_log2FC["gene_id"] <- longest_trans_info[match(trans_level_RPKM_log2FC$transcript_id,longest_trans_info$trans_id),4]
trans_level_RPKM_log2FC <- select(trans_level_RPKM_log2FC,gene_id,transcript_id,everything())
trans_level_RPKM_log2FC <- trans_level_RPKM_log2FC[match(gene_level_RPKM_log2FC$gene_id,trans_level_RPKM_log2FC$gene_id),]

cor.matrix <- cor(gene_level_RPKM_log2FC[,2:ncol(gene_level_RPKM_log2FC)],trans_level_RPKM_log2FC[,3:ncol(trans_level_RPKM_log2FC)])
library(gplots)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(circlize)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggplotify)
library(eoffice)

z<-Heatmap(
  as.matrix(cor.matrix),
  col = colorRamp2(c(-1,0,1), 
                   rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
  cluster_rows = T,
  cluster_columns = T,
  clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',
  clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
  clustering_distance_rows = 'euclidean',
  clustering_method_rows ="ward.D2",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),
  heatmap_legend_param = list(title="Pearson\nCorrelation",legend_direction="vertical"))
z.t <- as.ggplot(z)
print(z.t)
ggsave('Correlation_of_log2FC_gene_and_trans_level_clustered.pdf',plot=z.t,width=11,height=10)
ggsave('Correlation_of_log2FC_gene_and_trans_level_clustered.png',plot=z.t,width=11,height=10)
# topptx(z.t,"Correlation_of_log2FC_gene_and_trans_level_clustered.pptx",width=11,height=10)


trans_data <- trans_level_RPKM_log2FC
gene_data <- gene_level_RPKM_log2FC


corList <- list()
for (i in seq(1:(ncol(gene_data)-1))){
  sample1=colnames(gene_data)[i+1]
  sample2=colnames(trans_data)[2+i]
  if (sample1 != sample2){
    break
  }
  tmpdata=data.frame(trans=trans_data[sample1],gene=gene_data[sample2])
  tmpdata[tmpdata==0]=NA
  tmpdata=na.omit(tmpdata)
  tmpcor=as.numeric(cor.test(tmpdata[,1],tmpdata[,2])$estimate)
  tmppvale=as.numeric(cor.test(tmpdata[,1],tmpdata[,2])$p.value)
  corList[[i]]=c(sample1,tmpcor,tmppvale)
}
corListdata <- as.data.frame(t(as.data.frame(corList)))
corListdata$V2 <- unlist(lapply(corListdata$V2,function(x){as.numeric(x)}))
corListdata$V3 <- unlist(lapply(corListdata$V3,function(x){as.numeric(x)}))

cor.density.plot <- ggplot(data=corListdata,aes(x=V2,color="red"))+geom_density(linewidth=1)+theme_bw()+
  labs(x="Perason Correlation",y="Density",title="Correlation of log2FC between gene level RPKM and trans level RPKM")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size=15),
        axis.text = element_text(size=12,colour = "black"))#+
  #geom_vline(xintercept = median(corListdata$V2),col="blue",linetype="dashed")
print(cor.density.plot)
ggsave('Correlation_density_plot_of_log2FC_between_gene_and_trans_level_RPKM.pdf',plot=cor.density.plot)
ggsave('Correlation_density_plot_of_log2FC_between_gene_and_trans_level_RPKM.png',plot=cor.density.plot)
# topptx(cor.density.plot,"Correlation_density_plot_of_log2FC_between_gene_and_trans_level_RPKM.pptx")

colnames(corListdata) <- c("datasets","Correlation","pvalue")
write.table(corListdata[,1:2],"Correlation_density_plot_of_log2FC_between_gene_and_trans_level_RPKM.txt",quote = F,sep = "\t",row.names = F,col.names = T)
```

## 05. PCA for log2FC of transcript-level RPKM
```{r}
plot.pca=function(data,group){
  colnames(group)=c("ID","Groups")
  ID=unique(as.vector(group$ID))
  subdata=subset(data,select=ID)
  # subdata=log2(subdata)
  subdata=t(na.omit(subdata))
  data.pca = prcomp(subdata,scale. = TRUE)
  summary(data.pca)
  pca=as.data.frame(data.pca$x)
  pca$ID=rownames(pca)
  pca=merge(pca,group,by="ID")
  percent1=sprintf("%.1f%%",data.pca$sdev[1]^2/sum(data.pca$sdev^2)*100)
  percent2=sprintf("%.1f%%",data.pca$sdev[2]^2/sum(data.pca$sdev^2)*100)
  xlabel=paste("PC1 (",percent1,")")
  ylabel=paste("PC2 (",percent2,")")
  
  p <- ggscatter(pca,x="PC1",y="PC2",color="Groups",#label = "ID",
                 ellipse=F,ellipse.type='confidence',show.legend.text=F, size=3, 
                 font.label=c(8,"plain","black")) + 
    theme_bw() + 
    xlab(xlabel)+ylab(ylabel)+
    guides(color=guide_legend(title="Sample type"), fill=F) + 
    theme(axis.text=element_text(size=12,color='black'),
          axis.title=element_text(size=12,color='black'),
          legend.title=element_text(size=12,color='black'),
          legend.text=element_text(size=12,color='black'))
  return(p)
}


library(ggpubr)
library(ggrepel)
library(eoffice)
sample_info <- log2FC_sample_info[,c(2,3)]
plot.data <- gene_data
plot.data[plot.data==0] <-NA
gene_level_RPKM_log2FC.pca <- plot.pca(plot.data[,-1],sample_info)
print(gene_level_RPKM_log2FC.pca)
ggsave('gene_level_RPKM_log2FC.pca.pdf',plot=gene_level_RPKM_log2FC.pca,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('gene_level_RPKM_log2FC.pca.png',plot=gene_level_RPKM_log2FC.pca,width=8.5,height=7.5)


plot.data <- trans_data
plot.data[plot.data==0] <-NA
trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.pca <- plot.pca(plot.data[,-c(1,2)],sample_info)
print(trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.pca)
ggsave('trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.pca.pdf',plot=trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.pca,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.pca.png',plot=trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.pca,width=8.5,height=7.5)
# topptx(trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.pca,"trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.pca.pptx",width=8.5,height=7.5)

```

## 06. DE gene number of each dataset
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(eoffice)
DE_gene_number <- read.table("./SourceData/AA_starvation_DE_gene_number.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,sep = "\t",check.names = F)
rownames(DE_gene_number) <- DE_gene_number$DE
DE_gene_number <- DE_gene_number[,c(1,2,3)]
DE_gene_number.melt <- melt(DE_gene_number)


p <- ggplot(data=DE_gene_number.melt,aes(x=reorder(DE,-value),y=ifelse(variable=="up",value,-value),fill=variable))+
  geom_bar(stat="identity")+#geom_text(aes(label=value,vjust=ifelse(variable=="up",-0.4,1.1)))+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = abs,expand=expansion(mult=c(0.1,0.1)))+theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(vjust=0.5,hjust=1,angle=90))+labs(x="",y="Number")+scale_fill_manual(values=c("#E64B35FF","#4DBBD5FF"))
print(p)
ggsave('AA_starvation_DE_gene_number.pdf',plot=p,width=10,height=6.5)
ggsave('AA_starvation_DE_gene_number.png',plot=p,width=10,height=6.5)
# topptx(p,"AA_starvation_DE_gene_number.pptx",width = 10,height = 6.5)
```
## 07. Clustering of all DE genes
```{r}
Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_trans_level_CDS_RPKM_log2FC.txt",sep="\t",stringsAsFactors = F,header = T,check.names = F)
rownames(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC) <- Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC$transcript_id
all_sample_log2FC_info <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_treatment_conditions_log2FC.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,sep = "\t",check.names = F)

DE_union_geneID.data <- read.table("./SourceData/DE_union_geneID.txt",header = T)
DE_union_transID <- DE_union_geneID.data$DE_union_transID

library(RColorBrewer)
library(circlize)
library(eoffice)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(ggsci)
library("scales")
library(ggplotify)
library(ggpubr)
set.seed(1111)
annotation1 <- HeatmapAnnotation(df=data.frame(SampleType=all_sample_log2FC_info$Class,
                                               CellLine=all_sample_log2FC_info$Cell_line,
                                               BreastCancers=all_sample_log2FC_info$BreastCancers),
                                 show_legend = T,show_annotation_name = T,
                                 annotation_legend_param = list(SampleType=list(title="SampleType",legend_direction="vertical"),
                                                                CellLine=list(title="CellLine"),
                                                                BreastCancers=list(title="BreastCancers")),
                                 col=list(BreastCancers=c("N"="grey80","Y"="black"),
                                          SampleType=c("mTORC1 inhibitor"="#E64B35FF",
                                                       "Myc"="#4DBBD5FF","AA starvation"="#00A087FF",
                                                       "Serum starvation"="#3C5488FF","MNK inhibitor"="#F39B7FFF","ER stress"="#8491B4FF")))
rownames(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC) <- Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC$transcript_id
Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_DE_union <- Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC[DE_union_transID,]


Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_zerosum <- apply(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_DE_union[,2:ncol(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_DE_union)],1,function(x){sum(x==0)})
Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_filterZeros <- Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_DE_union[which(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_zerosum==0),]
Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_filterZeros <- Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_filterZeros[,all_sample_log2FC_info$SampleID]
zzzz<-Heatmap(as.matrix(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_filterZeros[,1:ncol(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_filterZeros)]),
            col = colorRamp2(c(-1,0,1), rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
            cluster_rows = T,cluster_columns = T,clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
            clustering_method_rows = "ward.D2",clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
            heatmap_legend_param = list(title="log2FC",legend_direction="vertical"),
            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),show_row_names = F,top_annotation = annotation1)
zzzz.ht <- draw(zzzz)
Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_ordered = Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_filterZeros[,1:ncol(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_filterZeros)][row_order(zzzz.ht),column_order(zzzz.ht)]
Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_ordered <- Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_DE_union[rownames(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_ordered),c("transcript_id",colnames(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_ordered))]
# write.table(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_ordered,"trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered.txt",quote = F,sep = "\t",row.names = F,col.names = T)
zzzz <- as.ggplot(zzzz)
print(zzzz)
ggsave('trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered.pdf',plot=zzzz,width=9,height=10)
ggsave('trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered.png',plot=zzzz,width=9,height=10)


### split into 4 clusters for transcript
library(dendextend)
r.dend <- row_dend(zzzz.ht) ##  获取行分类树
clusters <- cutree(r.dend,k=3) ## 切树分支

zzzz.ht_split<- Heatmap(as.matrix(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_filterZeros[,1:ncol(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_filterZeros)]), split = clusters,col = colorRamp2(c(-1,0,1), rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
            cluster_rows = T,cluster_columns = T,clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
            clustering_method_rows = "ward.D2",clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
            heatmap_legend_param = list(title="log2FC",legend_direction="vertical"),
            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),show_row_names = F,top_annotation = annotation1)
zzzz.ht_split.dw <- draw(zzzz.ht_split)
Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_ordered2 = Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_filterZeros[,1:ncol(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_filterZeros)][unlist(row_order(zzzz.ht_split.dw)),column_order(zzzz.ht_split.dw)]
Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_ordered2 <- Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_DE_union[rownames(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_ordered2),c("transcript_id",colnames(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_ordered2))]
# write.table(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_ordered2,"trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited.txt",quote = F,sep = "\t",row.names = F,col.names = T)
zzzz.ht_split <- as.ggplot(zzzz.ht_split)
print(zzzz.ht_split)
ggsave('trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited.pdf',plot=zzzz.ht_split,width=9,height=10)
ggsave('trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited.png',plot=zzzz.ht_split,width=9,height=10)
# topptx(zzzz.ht_split,'trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited.pptx',width=9,height=10)
```
## 08. Functional enrichment for 3 cluster genes
```{r}
zzzz_transID_clusters <- data.frame(transID=rownames(Ribo_RPKM_trans_level_log2FC_ordered2),clusters=rep(c(1,3,2),times=c(length(row_order(zzzz.ht_split.dw)[[1]]),length(row_order(zzzz.ht_split.dw)[[3]]),length(row_order(zzzz.ht_split.dw)[[2]])))) ## 获取分类之后的transcript id
zzzz_transID_clusters["GeneID"] <- longest_trans_info[match(zzzz_transID_clusters$transID,longest_trans_info$trans_id),4]

library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)

zzzz_transID_clusters_genesID <- unique(zzzz_transID_clusters$GeneID)

zzzz_transID_clusters_genesID_transformed <- bitr(zzzz_transID_clusters_genesID,fromType="ENSEMBL", toType=c("ENTREZID","SYMBOL"), OrgDb="org.Hs.eg.db")

zzzz_transID_clusters["Entrez"] <- zzzz_transID_clusters_genesID_transformed[match(zzzz_transID_clusters$GeneID,zzzz_transID_clusters_genesID_transformed$ENSEMBL),2]
zzzz_transID_clusters["Cluster"] <- 1
zzzz_transID_clusters[zzzz_transID_clusters$clusters==1,5] <- "C1"
zzzz_transID_clusters[zzzz_transID_clusters$clusters==2,5] <- "C2"
zzzz_transID_clusters[zzzz_transID_clusters$clusters==3,5] <- "C3"

zzzz_transID_clusters["GeneName"] <- longest_trans_info[match(zzzz_transID_clusters$transID,longest_trans_info$trans_id),5]

# write.table(zzzz_transID_clusters,"trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited_transID.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")

zzzz_transID_clusters.BP <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=zzzz_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="BP")
zzzz_transID_clusters.CC <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=zzzz_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="CC")
zzzz_transID_clusters.MF <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=zzzz_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="MF")
zzzz_transID_clusters.All <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=zzzz_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="All")
# zzzz_transID_clusters.KEGG <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=zzzz_transID_clusters,fun="enrichKEGG",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05)

zzzz_transID_clusters.BP.simplify <- simplify(zzzz_transID_clusters.BP)
zzzz_transID_clusters.CC.simplify <- simplify(zzzz_transID_clusters.CC)
zzzz_transID_clusters.MF.simplify <- simplify(zzzz_transID_clusters.MF)


gbp <- dotplot(zzzz_transID_clusters.BP.simplify, x="Cluster") 
gcc <- dotplot(zzzz_transID_clusters.CC.simplify, x="Cluster")
gmf <- dotplot(zzzz_transID_clusters.MF.simplify, x="Cluster")
gall <- dotplot(zzzz_transID_clusters.All, x="Cluster")
# gkegg <- dotplot(zzzz_transID_clusters.KEGG, x="Cluster")

print(gbp)

ggsave('trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited_GOBP.pdf',plot=gbp,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited_GOBP.png',plot=gbp,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited_GOCC.pdf',plot=gcc,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited_GOCC.png',plot=gcc,width=8.5,height=7.5)
# topptx(gbp,'trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited_GOBP.pptx',width=8.5,height=7.5)
# 
ggsave('trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited_GOMF.pdf',plot=gmf,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited_GOMF.png',plot=gmf,width=8.5,height=7.5)

ggsave('trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited_GOall.pdf',plot=gall,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited_GOall.png',plot=gall,width=8.5,height=7.5)
# 
# 
write.table(zzzz_transID_clusters.BP.simplify,"trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited_GOBP.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")
write.table(zzzz_transID_clusters.CC.simplify,"trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited_GOCC.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")
write.table(zzzz_transID_clusters.MF.simplify,"trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited_GOMF.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")
write.table(zzzz_transID_clusters.All,"trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited_GOAll.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")
# write.table(zzzz_transID_clusters.KEGG,"trans_level_RPKM_log2FC_DE_union_ordered_splited_KEGG.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")
```

## 09. Translation regulation of Leu starvation
```{r}
library(RColorBrewer)
library(circlize)
library(eoffice)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(ggsci)
library("scales")
library(ggplotify)
library(ggpubr)
set.seed(1111)


# DE.common.log2FC <- read.table("./SourceData/DEgenes_all_leu_starvation.txt",header = T)
# rownames(DE.common.log2FC) <- DE.common.log2FC$geneName
DE.top50.common.log2FC <- read.table("./SourceData/DEgenes_top50_leu_starvation.txt",header = T)
rownames(DE.top50.common.log2FC) <- DE.top50.common.log2FC$geneName

z1<-Heatmap(as.matrix(DE.top50.common.log2FC[,-1]),
            col = colorRamp2(c(-1,0,1), rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
            cluster_rows = T,cluster_columns = T,clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
            clustering_method_rows = "ward.D2",clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
            heatmap_legend_param = list(title="log2FC",legend_direction="vertical"),
            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),show_row_names = F)
library(dendextend)
r.dend <- row_dend(z1) ##  获取行分类树
clusters <- cutree(r.dend,k=2) ## 切树分支

z1_split<- Heatmap(as.matrix(DE.top50.common.log2FC[,-1]), split = clusters,col = colorRamp2(c(-1,0,1), rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
            cluster_rows = T,cluster_columns = T,clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
            clustering_method_rows = "ward.D2",clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
            heatmap_legend_param = list(title="log2FC",legend_direction="vertical"),
            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),show_row_names = F)
z1_split.dw <- draw(z1_split)
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2 = DE.top50.common.log2FC[,2:ncol(DE.top50.common.log2FC)][unlist(row_order(z1_split.dw)),column_order(z1_split.dw)]

# write.table(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2,"Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_order.txt",quote = F,sep = "\t",row.names = T,col.names = T)
z1_split <- as.ggplot(z1_split)
print(z1_split)
# ggsave('Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_order.pdf',plot=z1_split,width=9,height=10)
# ggsave('Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_order.png',plot=z1_split,width=9,height=10)
# topptx(z1_split,'Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_order.pptx',width=9,height=10)

z1_transID_clusters <- data.frame(transID=rownames(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2),clusters=rep(c(2,1),times=c(length(row_order(z1_split.dw)[[1]]),length(row_order(z1_split.dw)[[2]])))) ## 获取分类之后的transcript id
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)

z_transID_clusters_geneName <- unique(z1_transID_clusters$transID)

z_transID_clusters_geneName_transformed <- bitr(z_transID_clusters_geneName,fromType="SYMBOL", toType=c("ENTREZID","ENSEMBL"), OrgDb="org.Hs.eg.db")

z1_transID_clusters["Entrez"] <- z_transID_clusters_geneName_transformed[match(z1_transID_clusters$transID,z_transID_clusters_geneName_transformed$SYMBOL),2]
z1_transID_clusters["Cluster"] <- 1
z1_transID_clusters[z1_transID_clusters$clusters==1,4] <- "C1"
z1_transID_clusters[z1_transID_clusters$clusters==2,4] <- "C2"



# write.table(z1_transID_clusters,"Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")

z1_transID_clusters.BP <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=z1_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="BP")
z1_transID_clusters.CC <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=z1_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="CC")
z1_transID_clusters.MF <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=z1_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="MF")
z1_transID_clusters.All <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=z1_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="All")
# zzzz_transID_clusters.KEGG <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=zzzz_transID_clusters,fun="enrichKEGG",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05)

z1_transID_clusters.BP.simplify <- simplify(z1_transID_clusters.BP)
z1_transID_clusters.CC.simplify <- simplify(z1_transID_clusters.CC)
z1_transID_clusters.MF.simplify <- simplify(z1_transID_clusters.MF)


gbp <- dotplot(z1_transID_clusters.BP.simplify, x="Cluster") 
gcc <- dotplot(z1_transID_clusters.CC.simplify, x="Cluster")
gmf <- dotplot(z1_transID_clusters.MF.simplify, x="Cluster")
gall <- dotplot(z1_transID_clusters.All, x="Cluster")
# gkegg <- dotplot(zzzz_transID_clusters.KEGG, x="Cluster")

print(gall)
ggsave('Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOBP.pdf',plot=gbp,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOBP.png',plot=gbp,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOCC.pdf',plot=gcc,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOCC.png',plot=gcc,width=8.5,height=7.5)
# topptx(gbp,'Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOBP.pptx',width=8.5,height=7.5)
# 
ggsave('Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOMF.pdf',plot=gmf,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOMF.png',plot=gmf,width=8.5,height=7.5)
# 
ggsave('Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOall.pdf',plot=gall,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOall.png',plot=gall,width=8.5,height=7.5)
# topptx(gall,'Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOall.pptx',width=8.5,height=7.5)
# 
# 
write.table(z1_transID_clusters.BP.simplify,"Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOBP.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")
write.table(z1_transID_clusters.CC.simplify,"Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOCC.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")
write.table(z1_transID_clusters.MF.simplify,"Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOMF.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")
write.table(z1_transID_clusters.All,"Leu_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOAll.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")




### boxplot for C1 and C2 genes
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2$Clusters <- z1_transID_clusters[match(rownames(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2),z1_transID_clusters$transID),4]

library(reshape2)
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt <- melt(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2)
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt$Group <- "BreastCancers"
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt[which(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt$variable%in%c("HEK293.12h.noCHX","HEK293T.3h","Hela.3h","HEK293T.6h","HCT116.3h","HEK293.12h.CHX")),4] <- "NonBreastCancers"
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt$log2 <- log2(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt$value)
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt$Clusters <- factor(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt$Clusters,levels = c("C2","C1"))

library(ggpubr)
library(ggplot2)

p <- ggboxplot(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt,x="variable",y="value",color="Clusters",palette = "nejm",bxp.errorbar = T,add = "mean")+
  labs(x="",y="log2FC")+scale_color_manual(values =c("C2"="#5e9bd3","C1"="#ee6169"))+facet_wrap(~Clusters,ncol = 1)

my_comparisons <- list(c("SUM159.0.2.24h", "SUM159.12h"),c("SUM159.0.2.24h", "HEK293.12h.noCHX"),c("SUM159.0.2.24h", "HEK293T.3h"),
                       c("SUM159.0.2.24h", "Hela.3h"),c("SUM159.0.2.24h", "HEK293T.6h"),c("SUM159.0.2.24h", "HCT116.3h"),
                       c("SUM159.0.2.24h", "HEK293.12h.CHX"),c("SUM159.12h", "HEK293.12h.noCHX"),c("SUM159.12h", "HEK293T.3h"),
                       c("SUM159.12h", "Hela.3h"),c("SUM159.12h", "HEK293T.6h"),c("SUM159.12h", "HCT116.3h"),c("SUM159.12h", "HEK293.12h.CHX"),
                       c("HEK293.12h.noCHX", "HEK293T.3h"),c("HEK293.12h.noCHX", "Hela.3h"),c("HEK293.12h.noCHX", "HEK293T.6h"),
                       c("HEK293.12h.noCHX", "HCT116.3h"),c("HEK293.12h.noCHX", "HEK293.12h.CHX"),
                       c("HEK293T.3h", "Hela.3h"),c("HEK293T.3h", "HEK293T.6h"),c("HEK293T.3h", "HCT116.3h"),c("HEK293T.3h", "HEK293.12h.CHX"),
                       c("Hela.3h", "HEK293T.6h"),c("Hela.3h", "HCT116.3h"),c("Hela.3h", "HEK293.12h.CHX"),
                       c("HEK293T.6h", "HCT116.3h"),c("HEK293T.6h", "HEK293.12h.CHX"),c("HCT116.3h", "HEK293.12h.CHX"))
p = p + stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons,size = 8,method = "wilcox.test")

ggsave('Leu_DE_results_boxplot.pdf',plot=p,width=5.5,height=5)
ggsave('Leu_DE_results_boxplot.png',plot=p,width=5.5,height=5)
ggsave('Leu_DE_results_boxplot_pvalue.pdf',plot=p,width=9.5,height=18)
ggsave('Leu_DE_results_boxplot_pvalue.png',plot=p,width=9.5,height=18)

df <- DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt
conditions <- unique(df$variable)
pairwise_p <- combn(conditions, 2, function(pair) {
  x <- df$value[df$variable == pair[1]]
  y <- df$value[df$variable == pair[2]]
  # 执行 Wilcoxon 检验（默认双侧，非配对）
  test <- wilcox.test(x, y, exact = FALSE)  # exact=FALSE 处理 ties 时更快
  data.frame(
    group1 = pair[1],
    group2 = pair[2],
    p.value = test$p.value,
    statistic = test$statistic,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}, simplify = FALSE)

pairwise_table <- do.call(rbind, pairwise_p)

write.csv(pairwise_table, "Leu_DE_results_boxplot_value_wilcox_pairwise_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)


```


## 10. Translation regulation of Gln starvation
```{r}
library(RColorBrewer)
library(circlize)
library(eoffice)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(ggsci)
library("scales")
library(ggplotify)
library(ggpubr)
set.seed(1111)

DE.top50.common.log2FC <- read.table("./SourceData/DEgenes_top50_gln_starvation.txt",header = T)
rownames(DE.top50.common.log2FC) <- DE.top50.common.log2FC$geneName

z1<-Heatmap(as.matrix(DE.top50.common.log2FC[,-1]),
            col = colorRamp2(c(-1,0,1), rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
            cluster_rows = T,cluster_columns = T,clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
            clustering_method_rows = "ward.D2",clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
            heatmap_legend_param = list(title="log2FC",legend_direction="vertical"),
            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),show_row_names = F)
library(dendextend)
r.dend <- row_dend(z1) ##  获取行分类树
clusters <- cutree(r.dend,k=4) ## 切树分支

z1_split<- Heatmap(as.matrix(DE.top50.common.log2FC[,-1]), split = clusters,col = colorRamp2(c(-1,0,1), rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
            cluster_rows = T,cluster_columns = T,clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
            clustering_method_rows = "ward.D2",clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
            heatmap_legend_param = list(title="log2FC",legend_direction="vertical"),
            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),show_row_names = F)
z1_split.dw <- draw(z1_split)
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2 = DE.top50.common.log2FC[,2:ncol(DE.top50.common.log2FC)][unlist(row_order(z1_split.dw)),column_order(z1_split.dw)]

# write.table(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2,"Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_order.txt",quote = F,sep = "\t",row.names = T,col.names = T)
z1_split <- as.ggplot(z1_split)
print(z1_split)
ggsave('Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_order.pdf',plot=z1_split,width=9,height=10)
ggsave('Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_order.png',plot=z1_split,width=9,height=10)
# topptx(z1_split,'Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_order.pptx',width=9,height=10)

z1_transID_clusters <- data.frame(transID=rownames(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2),clusters=rep(c(2,3,1,4),times=c(length(row_order(z1_split.dw)[[1]]),length(row_order(z1_split.dw)[[2]]),length(row_order(z1_split.dw)[[3]]),length(row_order(z1_split.dw)[[4]])))) ## 获取分类之后的transcript id

library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)

z_transID_clusters_geneName <- unique(z1_transID_clusters$transID)

z_transID_clusters_geneName_transformed <- bitr(z_transID_clusters_geneName,fromType="SYMBOL", toType=c("ENTREZID","ENSEMBL"), OrgDb="org.Hs.eg.db")

z1_transID_clusters["Entrez"] <- z_transID_clusters_geneName_transformed[match(z1_transID_clusters$transID,z_transID_clusters_geneName_transformed$SYMBOL),2]
z1_transID_clusters["Cluster"] <- 1
z1_transID_clusters[z1_transID_clusters$clusters==1,4] <- "C1"
z1_transID_clusters[z1_transID_clusters$clusters==2,4] <- "C2"
z1_transID_clusters[z1_transID_clusters$clusters==3,4] <- "C3"
z1_transID_clusters[z1_transID_clusters$clusters==4,4] <- "C4"


write.table(z1_transID_clusters,"Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")

z1_transID_clusters.BP <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=z1_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="BP")
z1_transID_clusters.CC <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=z1_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="CC")
z1_transID_clusters.MF <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=z1_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="MF")
z1_transID_clusters.All <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=z1_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="All")
z1_transID_clusters.KEGG <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=z1_transID_clusters,fun="enrichKEGG",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05)

z1_transID_clusters.BP.simplify <- simplify(z1_transID_clusters.BP)
z1_transID_clusters.CC.simplify <- simplify(z1_transID_clusters.CC)
z1_transID_clusters.MF.simplify <- simplify(z1_transID_clusters.MF)


gbp <- dotplot(z1_transID_clusters.BP.simplify, x="Cluster") 
gcc <- dotplot(z1_transID_clusters.CC.simplify, x="Cluster")
gmf <- dotplot(z1_transID_clusters.MF.simplify, x="Cluster")
gall <- dotplot(z1_transID_clusters.All, x="Cluster")
# gkegg <- dotplot(zzzz_transID_clusters.KEGG, x="Cluster")
# 
ggsave('Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOBP.pdf',plot=gbp,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOBP.png',plot=gbp,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOCC.pdf',plot=gcc,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOCC.png',plot=gcc,width=8.5,height=7.5)
# topptx(gbp,'Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOBP.pptx',width=8.5,height=7.5)
# 
ggsave('Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOMF.pdf',plot=gmf,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOMF.png',plot=gmf,width=8.5,height=7.5)

ggsave('Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOall.pdf',plot=gall,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOall.png',plot=gall,width=8.5,height=7.5)
# topptx(gall,'Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOall.pptx',width=8.5,height=7.5)

print(gall)
write.table(z1_transID_clusters.BP.simplify,"Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOBP.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")
write.table(z1_transID_clusters.CC.simplify,"Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOCC.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")
write.table(z1_transID_clusters.MF.simplify,"Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOMF.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")
write.table(z1_transID_clusters.All,"Gln_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOAll.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")




### boxplot for C1 and C2 genes
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2$Clusters <- z1_transID_clusters[match(rownames(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2),z1_transID_clusters$transID),4]
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2 <- DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2[which(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2$Clusters%in%c("C2","C1")),]

library(reshape2)
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt <- melt(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2)
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt$Group <- "BreastCancers"
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt[which(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt$variable%in%c("Hela_9h","Hela_6h","MCF10A_EtOH_4h")),4] <- "NonBreastCancers"
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt$Clusters <- factor(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt$Clusters,levels = c("C2","C1"))
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt <- na.omit(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggplot2)

p <- ggboxplot(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt,x="variable",y="value",color="Clusters",palette = "nejm",bxp.errorbar = T,add = "mean")+ylim(-100,100)+
  labs(x="",y="log2FC")+scale_color_manual(values =c("C2"="#5e9bd3","C1"="#ee6169"))+facet_wrap(~Clusters,ncol = 1)

my_comparisons <- list(c("Hela_9h", "Hela_6h"),c("Hela_9h", "T47D_48h"),c("Hela_9h", "MDAMB231_48h"),c("Hela_9h", "MCF10A_TAM_4h"),
                       c("Hela_9h", "MCF7_48h"),c("Hela_9h", "MCF10A_EtOH_4h"),c("Hela_9h", "Hs578t_48h"),
                       c("Hela_6h", "T47D_48h"),c("Hela_6h", "MDAMB231_48h"),c("Hela_6h", "MCF10A_TAM_4h"),c("Hela_6h", "MCF7_48h"),
                       c("Hela_6h", "MCF10A_EtOH_4h"),c("Hela_6h", "Hs578t_48h"),
                       c("T47D_48h", "MDAMB231_48h"),c("T47D_48h", "MCF10A_TAM_4h"),c("T47D_48h", "MCF7_48h"),c("T47D_48h", "MCF10A_EtOH_4h"),
                       c("T47D_48h", "Hs578t_48h"),c("MDAMB231_48h", "MCF10A_TAM_4h"),c("MDAMB231_48h", "MCF7_48h"),
                       c("MDAMB231_48h", "MCF10A_EtOH_4h"),c("MDAMB231_48h", "Hs578t_48h"),
                       c("MCF10A_TAM_4h", "MCF7_48h"),c("MCF10A_TAM_4h", "MCF10A_EtOH_4h"),c("MCF10A_TAM_4h", "Hs578t_48h"),
                       c("MCF7_48h", "MCF10A_EtOH_4h"),c("MCF7_48h", "Hs578t_48h"),c("MCF10A_EtOH_4h", "Hs578t_48h"))


p = p + stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons,size = 8,method = "wilcox.test")

ggsave('Gln_DE_results_boxplot.pdf',plot=p,width=5.5,height=5)
ggsave('Gln_DE_results_boxplot.png',plot=p,width=5.5,height=5)
# ggsave('Gln_DE_results_boxplot_value.pdf',plot=p,width=9.5,height=20)
# ggsave('Gln_DE_results_boxplot_value.png',plot=p,width=9.5,height=20)

## calcualte pvalue and output
df <- DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt
conditions <- unique(df$variable)
pairwise_p <- combn(conditions, 2, function(pair) {
  x <- df$value[df$variable == pair[1]]
  y <- df$value[df$variable == pair[2]]
  # 执行 Wilcoxon 检验（默认双侧，非配对）
  test <- wilcox.test(x, y, exact = FALSE)  # exact=FALSE 处理 ties 时更快
  data.frame(
    group1 = pair[1],
    group2 = pair[2],
    p.value = test$p.value,
    statistic = test$statistic,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}, simplify = FALSE)

pairwise_table <- do.call(rbind, pairwise_p)

write.csv(pairwise_table, "Gln_DE_results_boxplot_value_wilcox_pairwise_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)


```


## 11. Translation regualtion of Serum starvation
```{r}
library(RColorBrewer)
library(circlize)
library(eoffice)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(ggsci)
library("scales")
library(ggplotify)
library(ggpubr)
set.seed(1111)

DE.top50.common.log2FC <- read.table("./SourceData/DEgenes_top50_serum_starvation.txt",header = T)
rownames(DE.top50.common.log2FC) <- DE.top50.common.log2FC$geneName

z1<-Heatmap(as.matrix(DE.top50.common.log2FC[,-c(1,2)]),
            col = colorRamp2(c(-1,0,1), rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
            cluster_rows = T,cluster_columns = T,clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
            clustering_method_rows = "ward.D2",clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
            heatmap_legend_param = list(title="log2FC",legend_direction="vertical"),
            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),show_row_names = F)
library(dendextend)
r.dend <- row_dend(z1) ##  获取行分类树
clusters <- cutree(r.dend,k=3) ## 切树分支

z1_split<- Heatmap(as.matrix(DE.top50.common.log2FC[,-c(1,2)]), split = clusters,col = colorRamp2(c(-1,0,1), rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
            cluster_rows = T,cluster_columns = T,clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
            clustering_method_rows = "ward.D2",clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
            heatmap_legend_param = list(title="log2FC",legend_direction="vertical"),
            column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),show_row_names = F)
z1_split.dw <- draw(z1_split)
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2 = DE.top50.common.log2FC[,2:ncol(DE.top50.common.log2FC)][unlist(row_order(z1_split.dw)),column_order(z1_split.dw)]

# write.table(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2,"Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_order.txt",quote = F,sep = "\t",row.names = T,col.names = T)
z1_split <- as.ggplot(z1_split)
print(z1_split)
ggsave('Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_order.pdf',plot=z1_split,width=9,height=10)
ggsave('Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_order.png',plot=z1_split,width=9,height=10)
# topptx(z1_split,'Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_order.pptx',width=9,height=10)

z1_transID_clusters <- data.frame(transID=rownames(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2),clusters=rep(c(3,1,2),times=c(length(row_order(z1_split.dw)[[1]]),length(row_order(z1_split.dw)[[2]]),length(row_order(z1_split.dw)[[3]])))) ## 获取分类之后的transcript id

library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)

z_transID_clusters_geneName <- unique(z1_transID_clusters$transID)

z_transID_clusters_geneName_transformed <- bitr(z_transID_clusters_geneName,fromType="SYMBOL", toType=c("ENTREZID","ENSEMBL"), OrgDb="org.Hs.eg.db")

z1_transID_clusters["Entrez"] <- z_transID_clusters_geneName_transformed[match(z1_transID_clusters$transID,z_transID_clusters_geneName_transformed$SYMBOL),2]
z1_transID_clusters["Cluster"] <- 1
z1_transID_clusters[z1_transID_clusters$clusters==1,4] <- "C1"
z1_transID_clusters[z1_transID_clusters$clusters==2,4] <- "C2"
z1_transID_clusters[z1_transID_clusters$clusters==3,4] <- "C3"



# write.table(z1_transID_clusters,"Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")

z1_transID_clusters.BP <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=z1_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="BP")
z1_transID_clusters.CC <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=z1_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="CC")
z1_transID_clusters.MF <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=z1_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="MF")
z1_transID_clusters.All <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=z1_transID_clusters,fun="enrichGO",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05,OrgDb='org.Hs.eg.db',ont="All")
# zzzz_transID_clusters.KEGG <- compareCluster(geneClusters = Entrez~Cluster,data=zzzz_transID_clusters,fun="enrichKEGG",pvalueCutoff=0.05,pAdjustMethod="fdr",qvalueCutoff =0.05)

z1_transID_clusters.BP.simplify <- simplify(z1_transID_clusters.BP)
z1_transID_clusters.CC.simplify <- simplify(z1_transID_clusters.CC)
z1_transID_clusters.MF.simplify <- simplify(z1_transID_clusters.MF)


gbp <- dotplot(z1_transID_clusters.BP.simplify, x="Cluster") 
gcc <- dotplot(z1_transID_clusters.CC.simplify, x="Cluster")
gmf <- dotplot(z1_transID_clusters.MF.simplify, x="Cluster")
gall <- dotplot(z1_transID_clusters.All, x="Cluster")
# gkegg <- dotplot(zzzz_transID_clusters.KEGG, x="Cluster")
# 
ggsave('Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOBP.pdf',plot=gbp,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOBP.png',plot=gbp,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOCC.pdf',plot=gcc,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOCC.png',plot=gcc,width=8.5,height=7.5)
# topptx(gbp,'Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOBP.pptx',width=8.5,height=7.5)
# 
ggsave('Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOMF.pdf',plot=gmf,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOMF.png',plot=gmf,width=8.5,height=7.5)
# 
ggsave('Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOall.pdf',plot=gall,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOall.png',plot=gall,width=8.5,height=7.5)
# topptx(gall,'Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOall.pptx',width=8.5,height=7.5)

print(gall)
write.table(z1_transID_clusters.BP.simplify,"Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOBP.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")
write.table(z1_transID_clusters.CC.simplify,"Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOCC.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")
write.table(z1_transID_clusters.MF.simplify,"Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOMF.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")
write.table(z1_transID_clusters.All,"Serum_starvation_log2FC_top50_DEgenes_geneID_splited_GOAll.txt",quote = F,row.names = F,col.names = T,sep = "\t")




### boxplot for C1 and C2 genes
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2$Clusters <- z1_transID_clusters[match(rownames(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2),z1_transID_clusters$transID),4]
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2$NewClusters <- "C2"
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2[DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2$Clusters=="C1",8] <- "C1"
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2[DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2$Clusters=="C3",8] <- "C1"

library(reshape2)
DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt <- melt(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2[,-7])

DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt$NewClusters <- factor(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt$NewClusters,levels = c("C1","C2"))

library(ggpubr)
library(ggplot2)

p <- ggboxplot(DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt,x="variable",y="value",color="NewClusters",palette = "nejm",bxp.errorbar = T,add = "mean")+
  labs(x="",y="log2FC")+scale_color_manual(values =c("C2"="#5e9bd3","C1"="#ee6169"))+facet_wrap(~NewClusters,ncol = 1)

my_comparisons <- list(c("M231_1h", "HMECs_1h"),c("M231_1h","SUM159PT_1h"),c("M231_1h","HEK293_2h"),c("M231_1h","MCF10A_2h"),c("M231_1h","HMECs_24h"),
                       c("HMECs_1h","HEK293_2h"),c("HMECs_1h","SUM159PT_1h"),c("HMECs_1h","MCF10A_2h"),c("HMECs_1h","HMECs_24h"),
                       c("SUM159PT_1h","HEK293_2h"),c("SUM159PT_1h","MCF10A_2h"),c("SUM159PT_1h","HMECs_24h"),
                       c("HEK293_2h","MCF10A_2h"),c("HEK293_2h","HMECs_24h"),c("MCF10A_2h","HMECs_24h")
                       )
p = p + stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons,size = 8,method = "wilcox.test")

ggsave('Serum_DE_results_boxplot.pdf',plot=p,width=5.5,height=5)
ggsave('Serum_DE_results_boxplot.png',plot=p,width=5.5,height=5)



ggsave('Serum_DE_results_boxplot_pvalue.pdf',plot=p,width=8.5,height=15)
ggsave('Serum_DE_results_boxplot_pvalue.png',plot=p,width=8.5,height=15)


df <- DE.top50.common.log2FC_ordered2.melt
conditions <- unique(df$variable)
pairwise_p <- combn(conditions, 2, function(pair) {
  x <- df$value[df$variable == pair[1]]
  y <- df$value[df$variable == pair[2]]
  # 执行 Wilcoxon 检验（默认双侧，非配对）
  test <- wilcox.test(x, y, exact = FALSE)  # exact=FALSE 处理 ties 时更快
  data.frame(
    group1 = pair[1],
    group2 = pair[2],
    p.value = test$p.value,
    statistic = test$statistic,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}, simplify = FALSE)

pairwise_table <- do.call(rbind, pairwise_p)

write.csv(pairwise_table, "Serum_DE_results_boxplot_value_wilcox_pairwise_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)


```


## 12. Collections of TOP and TOP-like mRNAs
```{r}
s94_TOP_and_TOPlike <- read.table("./SourceData/94_TOP_and_TOP_like_mRNAs.txt")
s90_PRTE <- read.table("./SourceData/90_PRTE_mRNAs.txt")

uniongene <- union(s94_TOP_and_TOPlike$V1,s90_PRTE$V1)

library(VennDiagram)

## 2D
venn.diagram(list(`94TOPAndTOPlike`=s94_TOP_and_TOPlike$V1,`90PRTE`=s90_PRTE$V1),
             filename = "x1_x2.tiff",
             fill=c("red","blue"),
             alpha=c(0.5,0.5),
             cat.cex=1.5,
             cex=1.5,
             cat.dist=c(0.1,0.1),
             cat.pos=c(-20,20),
             cat.fontfamily = "serif",
             cat.fontface = "bold")
```

## 12. Translation level of TOP mRNAs
```{r}
top_mRNAs_143 <- read.table("./SourceData/143_top_top_like_genes.txt",header = T)
gene_data["gene_name"] <- longest_trans_info[match(gene_data$gene_id,longest_trans_info$gene_id),5]
gene_data["trans_id"] <- longest_trans_info[match(gene_data$gene_id,longest_trans_info$gene_id),2]
gene_data <- select(gene_data,gene_id,gene_name,trans_id,everything())

trans_data["gene_name"] <- longest_trans_info[match(trans_data$gene_id,longest_trans_info$gene_id),5]
trans_data <- select(trans_data,gene_id,gene_name,transcript_id,everything())

top_mRNAs_143_gene_level_log2FC <- na.omit(gene_data[match(top_mRNAs_143$gene_name,gene_data$gene_name),])
top_mRNAs_143_trans_level_log2FC <- na.omit(trans_data[match(top_mRNAs_143$gene_name,trans_data$gene_name),])


## correlation map
cor.matrix2 <- cor(top_mRNAs_143_gene_level_log2FC[,4:ncol(top_mRNAs_143_gene_level_log2FC)],top_mRNAs_143_trans_level_log2FC[,4:ncol(top_mRNAs_143_trans_level_log2FC)])
library(gplots)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(circlize)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggplotify)
library(eoffice)

log2FC_sample_info <- log2FC_sample_info[match(colnames(cor.matrix2),log2FC_sample_info$SampleID),]
left_annotation <- rowAnnotation(df=data.frame(CellLine=log2FC_sample_info$BreastCancers,Condition=log2FC_sample_info$Condition,Class=log2FC_sample_info$Class),show_legend = T,show_annotation_name = F)#annotation_legend_param = list(title="Type",legend_direction="vertical"))

z2<-Heatmap(
  as.matrix(cor.matrix2),
  col = colorRamp2(c(-1,0,1), 
                   rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
  cluster_rows = T,
  cluster_columns = T,
  clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',
  clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
  clustering_distance_rows = 'euclidean',
  clustering_method_rows ="ward.D2",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),
  heatmap_legend_param = list(title="Pearson\nCorrelation",legend_direction="vertical"))#left_annotation = left_annotation)
z2.t <- as.ggplot(z2)
print(z2.t)
# ggsave('TOP_mRNAs_Correlation_of_log2FC_gene_and_trans_level_clustered.pdf',plot=z2.t,width=11,height=10)
# ggsave('TOP_mRNAs_Correlation_of_log2FC_gene_and_trans_level_clustered.png',plot=z2.t,width=11,height=10)


## heatmap for TOP mRNAs
AA_starvation_data <- top_mRNAs_143_gene_level_log2FC[,c("gene_name",log2FC_sample_info[log2FC_sample_info$Class%in%c("AA starvation","mTORC1 inhibitor","Serum starvation"),"SampleID"])]
rownames(AA_starvation_data) <- AA_starvation_data$gene_name
AA_starvation_data[AA_starvation_data==0] <- NA
AA_starvation_data <- na.omit(AA_starvation_data)
# write.table(AA_starvation_data,"TOP_mRNAs_log2FC_gene_level.txt",sep = "\t",quote = F,col.names = T,row.names = F)

top_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(df=data.frame(BreastCancers=log2FC_sample_info[log2FC_sample_info$Class%in%c("AA starvation","mTORC1 inhibitor","Serum starvation"),]$BreastCancers),show_legend = T,show_annotation_name = F)#annotation_legend_param = list(title="Type",legend_direction="vertical"))


AA_starvation_data <- top_mRNAs_143_trans_level_log2FC[,c("gene_name",log2FC_sample_info[log2FC_sample_info$Class%in%c("AA starvation","mTORC1 inhibitor","Serum starvation"),"SampleID"])]
rownames(AA_starvation_data) <- AA_starvation_data$gene_name
AA_starvation_data[AA_starvation_data==0] <- NA
AA_starvation_data <- na.omit(AA_starvation_data)

write.table(AA_starvation_data,"TOP_mRNAs_log2FC_trans_level.txt",sep = "\t",quote = F,col.names = T,row.names = F)

AA_starvation_samples_info <- log2FC_sample_info[match(colnames(AA_starvation_data[,-1]),log2FC_sample_info$SampleID),]
top_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(df=data.frame(SampleType=AA_starvation_samples_info$Class,
                                               CellLine=AA_starvation_samples_info$Cell_line,
                                               BreastCancers=AA_starvation_samples_info$BreastCancers),
                                 show_legend = T,show_annotation_name = T,
                                 annotation_legend_param = list(SampleType=list(title="SampleType",legend_direction="vertical"),
                                                                CellLine=list(title="CellLine"),
                                                                BreastCancers=list(title="BreastCancers")),
                                 col=list(BreastCancers=c("N"="grey80","Y"="black"),
                                          SampleType=c("mTORC1 inhibitor"="#E64B35FF",
                                                       "Myc"="#4DBBD5FF","AA starvation"="#00A087FF",
                                                       "Serum starvation"="#3C5488FF","MNK inhibitor"="#F39B7FFF","ER stress"="#8491B4FF")))

z3<-Heatmap(
  as.matrix(AA_starvation_data[,-1]),
  col = colorRamp2(c(-1,0,1),
                   rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
  cluster_rows = T,
  cluster_columns = T,
  clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',
  clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
  clustering_distance_rows = 'euclidean',
  clustering_method_rows ="ward.D2",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=4),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),
  heatmap_legend_param = list(title="log2FC",legend_direction="vertical"),top_annotation =top_annotation)
z3.t <- as.ggplot(z3)
print(z3.t)
ggsave('TOP_mRNAs_log2FC_trans_level_clustered.pdf',plot=z3.t,width=11,height=10)
ggsave('TOP_mRNAs_log2FC_trans_level_clustered.png',plot=z3.t,width=11,height=10)

## boxplot for TOP MRNAs
library(reshape2)
AA_starvation_data.median <- apply(AA_starvation_data[,-1],2,median)
AA_starvation_data.median.sort <- as.data.frame(sort(AA_starvation_data.median,decreasing = T))
colnames(AA_starvation_data.median.sort) <- "log2FC"
AA_starvation_data.sort <- AA_starvation_data[,c("gene_name",rownames(AA_starvation_data.median.sort))]
AA_starvation_data.melt <- melt(AA_starvation_data.sort[,-1])
AA_starvation_data.melt["BreastCancers"] <- log2FC_sample_info[match(AA_starvation_data.melt$variable,log2FC_sample_info$SampleID),6]

bx.p <- ggplot(data=AA_starvation_data.melt,aes(x=variable,y=value,fill=BreastCancers))+geom_boxplot()+theme_bw()+
  labs(x="Samples",y="log2FC(RPKM)",title="Targets of mTORC1")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5),axis.text.x = element_blank(),axis.text = element_text(size=12),axis.title = element_text(size=15))+
  #geom_hline(yintercept = 1,color="red",linetype="dashed")+geom_hline(yintercept = -1,color="red",linetype="dashed")+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0,color="blue",linetype="dashed",linewidth=1.2)
ggsave('TOP_mRNAs_log2FC_trans_level_clustered_boxplot.pdf',plot=bx.p,width=16,height=6)
ggsave('TOP_mRNAs_log2FC_trans_level_clustered_boxplot.png',plot=bx.p,width=16,height=6)
# topptx(bx.p,"TOP_mRNAs_log2FC_trans_level_clustered_boxplot.pptx",width = 16,height = 6)
write.table(AA_starvation_data.median.sort,"TOP_mRNAs_log2FC_trans_level_clustered_boxplot.txt",quote = F,sep = "\t",row.names = T,col.names = T)


```


## 13. UMAP of log2FC for TOP mRNAs
```{r}
AA_starvation_data <- top_mRNAs_143_trans_level_log2FC[,c("gene_name",log2FC_sample_info[log2FC_sample_info$Class%in%c("AA starvation","mTORC1 inhibitor","Serum starvation"),"SampleID"])]
rownames(AA_starvation_data) <- AA_starvation_data$gene_name
# AA_starvation_data[AA_starvation_data==0] <- NA
# AA_starvation_data <- na.omit(AA_starvation_data)
AA_starvation_samples_info <- log2FC_sample_info[match(colnames(AA_starvation_data[,-1]),log2FC_sample_info$SampleID),c("SampleID","BreastCancers")]

library(umap)
plot.umap=function(data,group){
  colnames(group)=c("ID","Groups")
  ID=unique(as.vector(group$ID))
  subdata=subset(data,select=ID)
  # subdata=log2(subdata)
  subdata=t(na.omit(subdata))
  data.umap = umap(subdata)
  umap=as.data.frame(data.umap$layout)
  umap$ID=rownames(umap)
  umap=merge(umap,group,by="ID")
  xlabel="UMAP_1"
  ylabel="UMAP_2"
  
  p <- ggscatter(umap,x="V1",y="V2",color="Groups",
                 ellipse=T,ellipse.type='norm',show.legend.text=F, size=3, 
                 font.label=c(8,"plain","black")) + 
    theme_bw() + 
    xlab(xlabel)+ylab(ylabel)+
    guides(color=guide_legend(title="Breast Cancers"), fill=F) + 
    theme(axis.text=element_text(size=12,color='black'),
          axis.title=element_text(size=12,color='black'),
          legend.title=element_text(size=12,color='black'),
          legend.text=element_text(size=12,color='black'))
  return(p)
}

plot.data <- AA_starvation_data
plot.data[plot.data==0] <-NA
trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.umap <- plot.umap(plot.data[,-1],AA_starvation_samples_info)
print(trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.umap)
ggsave('TOP_mRNA_trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.umap.pdf',plot=trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.umap,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave('TOP_mRNA_trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.umap.png',plot=trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.umap,width=8.5,height=7.5)
# topptx(trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.umap,"TOP_mRNA_trans_level_RPKM_log2FC.umap.pptx",width=8.5,height=7.5)


```

## 14. Correlation between log2FC of RPF and protein for TOP and TOP-like mRNAs
```{r}
GSE139910_protein <- read.table("./SourceData/GSE139910_protein_abundance.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F,sep = "\t")
GSE139910_protein_topmRNA <- na.omit(GSE139910_protein[match(top_mRNAs_143$gene_name,GSE139910_protein$gene_name),])
GSE139910_protein_topmRNA["log2RPKM(RPF)"] <- top_mRNAs_143_gene_level_log2FC[match(GSE139910_protein_topmRNA$gene_name,top_mRNAs_143_gene_level_log2FC$gene_name),"PATU-8902-SerAndGly-24h(GSE139910)"]


GSE139910_topmRNA <- GSE139910_protein_topmRNA
colnames(GSE139910_topmRNA) <- c("Gene_name","log2Protein(24h)","log2Protein(48h)","Z-score","log2RPF(24h)")

library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)


g <- ggplot(data=GSE139910_topmRNA,aes(x=`log2Protein(24h)`,y=`log2RPF(24h)`))+geom_point(size=4,alpha=0.7)+
  labs(xlab="log2Protein(24h)",ylab="log2PRF(24h)")+xlim(-1,0.5)+ylim(-1.5,3)+
  geom_smooth(data=GSE139910_topmRNA,mapping = aes(x=`log2Protein(24h)`,y=`log2RPF(24h)`),method = "lm")+#geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1,color="red", linetype="dashed", size=1)+
  
  theme_bw()+annotate("text", x = -0.7 , y = 2.5,label = "Spearman's correlation: 0.476\np-value: 7.528e-08",colour="black")

print(g)

cor.test(GSE139910_topmRNA$`log2Protein(24h)`,GSE139910_topmRNA$`log2RPF(24h)`,method = "spearman")

ggsave('GSE139910_protein_vs_RPF_scatterPlot.pdf',plot=g,width=6,height=6)
ggsave('GSE139910_protein_vs_RPF_scatterPlot.png',plot=g,width=6,height=6)
# topptx(g,"GSE139910_protein_vs_RPF_scatterPlot.pptx",width=6,height=6)

```
## 15. targets of GCN2-eIF2α pathway
```{r}
ATF4_CHOP_targets <- read.table("./SourceData/ATF4_and_CHOP_targets.txt",header = T,sep = "\t",stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F)
ATF4_CHOP_targets["gene_id"] <- longest_trans_info[match(ATF4_CHOP_targets$Symbol,longest_trans_info$gene_name),4]
ATF4_CHOP_targets_withdata <- ATF4_CHOP_targets[which(ATF4_CHOP_targets$Symbol%in%longest_trans_info$gene_name),]
ATF4_CHOP_targets_gene_level_log2FC <- gene_level_RPKM_log2FC[match(ATF4_CHOP_targets_withdata$gene_id,gene_level_RPKM_log2FC$gene_id),]
ATF4_CHOP_targets_trans_level_log2FC <- trans_level_RPKM_log2FC[match(ATF4_CHOP_targets_withdata$gene_id,trans_level_RPKM_log2FC$gene_id),]
ERStress_samples <- log2FC_sample_info[which(log2FC_sample_info$Class%in%c("AA starvation","ER stress")),] # "mTORC1 inhibitor"

ATF4_ATF5_CHOP_GADD34_gene_log2FC <- gene_level_RPKM_log2FC[which(gene_level_RPKM_log2FC$gene_id%in%c("ENSG00000128272","ENSG00000169136","ENSG00000175197","ENSG00000087074")),c("gene_id",ERStress_samples$SampleID)]
rownames(ATF4_ATF5_CHOP_GADD34_gene_log2FC) <- c("GADD34","ATF4","ATF5","CHOP")
top_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(df=data.frame(BreastCancers=ERStress_samples[ERStress_samples$Class%in%c("AA starvation","ER stress"),]$BreastCancers),col=list(BreastCancers=c(Y="red",N="blue")),show_legend = T,show_annotation_name = F)#annotation_legend_param =  list(title="Type",legend_direction="vertical"))

z2<-Heatmap(
  as.matrix(ATF4_ATF5_CHOP_GADD34_gene_log2FC[,-1]),
  col = colorRamp2(c(-1,0,1), 
                   rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
  cluster_rows = T,
  cluster_columns = T,
  clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',
  clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
  clustering_distance_rows = 'euclidean',
  clustering_method_rows ="ward.D2",
  rect_gp = gpar(col="white"),
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),
  heatmap_legend_param = list(title="log2FC",legend_direction="vertical"),top_annotation = top_annotation)
z2.t <- as.ggplot(z2)
print(z2.t)
ggsave('ATF4_CHOP_log2FC_gene_level_clustered.pdf',plot=z2.t,width=10,height=4)
ggsave('ATF4_CHOP_log2FC_gene_level_clustered.png',plot=z2.t,width=10,height=4)



ATF4_CHOP_targets_trans_level_log2FC_ERstress <- ATF4_CHOP_targets_trans_level_log2FC[,c("gene_id",ERStress_samples$SampleID)]
ATF4_CHOP_targets_trans_level_log2FC_ERstress[ATF4_CHOP_targets_trans_level_log2FC_ERstress==0] <- NA
ATF4_CHOP_targets_trans_level_log2FC_ERstress <- na.omit(ATF4_CHOP_targets_trans_level_log2FC_ERstress)
ATF4_CHOP_targets_withdata_lefted <- ATF4_CHOP_targets_withdata[match(ATF4_CHOP_targets_trans_level_log2FC_ERstress$gene_id,ATF4_CHOP_targets_withdata$gene_id),]

left_annotation <- rowAnnotation(df=data.frame(Type=ATF4_CHOP_targets_withdata_lefted$Overlap),col=list(Type=c(ATF4_Only="red",Common="gray",CHOP_Only="blue")),show_legend = T,show_annotation_name = F)#annotation_legend_param = list(title="Type",legend_direction="vertical"))
rownames(ATF4_CHOP_targets_trans_level_log2FC_ERstress) <- ATF4_CHOP_targets_trans_level_log2FC_ERstress$gene_id


z4<-Heatmap(
  as.matrix(ATF4_CHOP_targets_trans_level_log2FC_ERstress[,-1]),
  col = colorRamp2(c(-1,0,1), 
                   rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
  cluster_rows = T,
  cluster_columns = T,
  clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',
  clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
  clustering_distance_rows = 'euclidean',
  clustering_method_rows ="ward.D2",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=1),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),
  heatmap_legend_param = list(title="log2FC",legend_direction="vertical"),left_annotation = left_annotation)
z4.t <- as.ggplot(z4)
print(z4.t)
ggsave('ATF4_CHOP_targets_log2FC_trans_level_clustered.pdf',plot=z4.t,width=11,height=10)
ggsave('ATF4_CHOP_targets_log2FC_trans_level_clustered.png',plot=z4.t,width=11,height=10)
```
## 16. Ribosome stalling at A-site position for all amino acid starvation datasets
```{r}
all_codon_level_log2FC_Asite <- read.table("./SourceData/all_codon_level_log2FC_Asite.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F,sep = "\t")

all_AA_level_log2FC_Asite <- read.table("./SourceData/all_AA_level_log2FC_Asite.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F,sep = "\t")

log2FC_samples_info <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_treatment_conditions_log2FC.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,sep = "\t",check.names = F)

AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info <- log2FC_samples_info[which(log2FC_samples_info$Class%in%c("AA starvation","mTORC1 inhibitor","Serum starvation")),]
AA_starvation_codon_level_log2FC_Asite <- all_codon_level_log2FC_Asite[,c("AA","codon",AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info$SampleID)]
rownames(AA_starvation_codon_level_log2FC_Asite) <- paste0(AA_starvation_codon_level_log2FC_Asite$codon,"(",AA_starvation_codon_level_log2FC_Asite$AA,")")

library(gplots)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(circlize)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggplotify)
library(eoffice)
top_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(df=data.frame(SampleType=AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info$Class,
                                               CellLine=AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info$Cell_line,
                                               BreastCancers=AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info$BreastCancers),
                                 show_legend = T,show_annotation_name = T,
                                 annotation_legend_param = list(SampleType=list(title="SampleType",legend_direction="vertical"),
                                                                CellLine=list(title="CellLine"),
                                                                BreastCancers=list(title="BreastCancers")),
                                 col=list(BreastCancers=c("N"="grey80","Y"="black"),
                                          SampleType=c("mTORC1 inhibitor"="#E64B35FF",
                                                       "AA starvation"="#4DBBD5FF","Serum starvation"="#00A087FF",
                                                       "ER stress"="#3C5488FF")))
AA_annotations <- AA_starvation_codon_level_log2FC_Asite[,c(1,2)]
AA_annotations[AA_annotations$AA%in%c("A","P","G","V","W","I","F","M","L"),3] <- "Polar"
AA_annotations[AA_annotations$AA%in%c('T','Y','Q','C','N','S'),3] <- "Non-Polar"
AA_annotations[AA_annotations$AA%in%c('K','H','R'),3] <- "Positive"
AA_annotations[AA_annotations$AA%in%c('D','E'),3] <- "Negative"

left_annotation <- rowAnnotation(df=data.frame(AAType=AA_annotations$V3),show_legend=T,show_annotation_name=T,
                                 #annotation_legend_parm=list(AAType=list(title="AAtype")),
                                 col=list(AAType=c("Polar"="#8952A0","Non-Polar"="#959897","Positive"="#AD002AFF","Negative"="#00468BFF")))

AA_starvation_codon_level_log2FC_Asite.sorted <- AA_starvation_codon_level_log2FC_Asite[,AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info$SampleID]
AA_h1<-Heatmap(
  as.matrix(AA_starvation_codon_level_log2FC_Asite.sorted),
  col = colorRamp2(c(-1,0,1), 
                   rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
  cluster_rows = T,
  cluster_columns = T,
  clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',
  clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
  clustering_distance_rows = 'euclidean',
  clustering_method_rows ="ward.D2",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),
  #column_title = "A-site",row_title = "P-site",
  heatmap_legend_param = list(title="log2FC",legend_direction="vertical"),top_annotation = top_annotation,right_annotation=left_annotation,show_row_names = T,show_column_names = T)
AA_h1.t <- as.ggplot(AA_h1)
print(AA_h1.t)
ggsave('AA_starvation_Hierachical_clustering_of_AA_starvation_codon_log2FC_Asite.pdf',plot=AA_h1.t,width=12,height=12.5)
ggsave('AA_starvation_Hierachical_clustering_of_AA_starvation_codon_log2FC_Asite.png',plot=AA_h1.t,width=12,height=12.5)


```

## 17. delta polarity
```{r}
AllDiffPolarity <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_diff_polarity.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F,sep = "\t")
rownames(AllDiffPolarity) <- AllDiffPolarity$transcript_id
AllDiffPolarity <- AllDiffPolarity[,-1]
SampleInfo <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_info.txt",header = T,sep="\t",fill=T)
RPKMMean <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_trans_level_CDS_RPKM_mean.txt",header = T,sep = "\t")


## summary of each transcripts
RowMean <- apply(AllDiffPolarity,1,mean)
summary(RowMean)

AllDiffPolarity <- AllDiffPolarity[rowMeans(AllDiffPolarity)!=0,]
summary(rowMeans(AllDiffPolarity))

## heatmap of the diff polarity
library(gplots)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(circlize)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggplotify)
library(eoffice)


z1<-Heatmap(
    as.matrix(AllDiffPolarity),
    col = colorRamp2(c(-0.5,0,0.5), 
                     rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
    cluster_rows = T,
    cluster_columns = T,
    clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',
    clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
    clustering_distance_rows = 'euclidean',
    clustering_method_rows ="ward.D2",
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=5),
    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=5),
    column_title = "sample",row_title = "gene",
    show_row_names = F,show_column_names = T,
    heatmap_legend_param = list(title="z-score",legend_direction="vertical"))
z1.t <- as.ggplot(z1)
ggsave(paste0("allPolarity_heatmap",".pdf"),plot=z1.t,width=8.5,height=7.5)
ggsave(paste0("allPolarity_heatmap",".png"),plot=z1.t,width=8.5,height=7.5)

## filter
RPKMMean.filter <- RPKMMean[rowMeans(RPKMMean[,-1])>=1,]
AllDiffPolarity.filter <- AllDiffPolarity[RPKMMean.filter$trans_id,]

library(gplots)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(circlize)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggplotify)
library(eoffice)




  z1<-Heatmap(
    as.matrix(AllDiffPolarity.filter),
    col = colorRamp2(c(-0.5,0,0.5), 
                     rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
    cluster_rows = T,
    cluster_columns = T,
    clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',
    clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
    clustering_distance_rows = 'euclidean',
    clustering_method_rows ="ward.D2",
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=5),
    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),
    column_title = "sample",row_title = "gene",
    show_row_names = F,show_column_names = T,
    heatmap_legend_param = list(title="Diff polarity",legend_direction="vertical"))
  z1_ordered <- AllDiffPolarity.filter[unlist(row_order(z1)),column_order(z1)]
  
  z1.t <- as.ggplot(z1)
  ggsave(paste0("allPolarity_filter_heatmap",".pdf"),plot=z1.t,width=10.5,height=7.5)
  ggsave(paste0("allPolarity_filter_heatmap",".png"),plot=z1.t,width=10.5,height=7.5)
  write.table(z1_ordered,"allPolarity_filter_heatmap_ordered.txt",quote = F,sep = "\t",row.names = T,col.names = T)
  
  ## boxplot---mean
  AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean <- apply(AllDiffPolarity.filter,2,mean)
  AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean <- as.data.frame(AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean)
  colnames(AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean) <- "polarity"
  AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean$Condition <- rownames(AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean)
  AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean <- AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean[order(AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean$polarity),]
  
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
  
AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean$Condition <- factor(AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean$Condition,levels = unique(AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean$Condition))
AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean$Cells <- SampleInfo[match(AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean$Condition,SampleInfo$TranscriptID),4]
AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean$BreastCancers <- "N"
AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean[which(AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean$Cells%in%c("Hs578t","MCF7","MDA-MB-231","MDAMB231","SUM159PT","T47D","ZR75-1")),4] <- "Y"
AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean$BreastCancers <- factor(AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean$BreastCancers,levels = c("Y","N"))
p <- ggplot(data = AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean, aes(x = Condition, y = polarity, fill = BreastCancers)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(0.7)) + labs(x="Condition",y="Diff(Polarity)") + scale_fill_manual(values = c("Y" = "#ee6169", "N" = "#5e9bd3"))+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 1, hjust=1),  # Codon 旋转 90 度（180 会倒着看）
    legend.position = "top"  # 如果你不想显示图例
  )+ylim(-0.2,0.2)

ggsave("allPolarity_filter_mean_barplot.pdf",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)
ggsave("allPolarity_filter_mean_barplot.png",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)

p <- ggplot(data = AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean, aes(x = Condition, y = polarity)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black",fill="#5e9bd3", size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(0.7)) + labs(x="Condition",y="Diff(Polarity)") +#scale_fill_manual(values =  "#5e9bd3")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 1, hjust=1),  # Codon 旋转 90 度（180 会倒着看）
    legend.position = "top"  # 如果你不想显示图例
  )+ylim(-0.2,0.2)

ggsave("allPolarity_filter_mean_barplot_noColor.pdf",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)
ggsave("allPolarity_filter_mean_barplot_noColor.pdf",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)

AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean$Condition <- factor(AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean$Condition,levels = colnames(z1_ordered))
p <- ggplot(data = AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean, aes(x = Condition, y = polarity, fill = BreastCancers)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(0.7)) + labs(x="Condition",y="Diff(Polarity)") + scale_fill_manual(values = c("Y" = "#ee6169", "N" = "#5e9bd3"))+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 1, hjust=1),  # Codon 旋转 90 度（180 会倒着看）
    legend.position = "top"  # 如果你不想显示图例
  )+ylim(-0.2,0.2)

ggsave("allPolarity_filter_mean_barplot_ordered.pdf",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)
ggsave("allPolarity_filter_mean_barplot_ordered.png",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)


p <- ggplot(data = AllDiffPolarity.filter.mean, aes(x = Condition, y = polarity)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", fill="#5e9bd3",size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(0.7)) + labs(x="Condition",y="Diff(Polarity)") +# scale_fill_manual(values = c("Y" = "#ee6169", "N" = "#5e9bd3"))+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 1, hjust=1),  # Codon 旋转 90 度（180 会倒着看）
    legend.position = "top"  # 如果你不想显示图例
  )+ylim(-0.2,0.2)

ggsave("allPolarity_filter_mean_barplot_ordered_noColor.pdf",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)
ggsave("allPolarity_filter_mean_barplot_ordered_noColor.png",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)


  ## boxplot-median
  AllDiffPolarity.filter.median <- apply(AllDiffPolarity.filter,2,median)
  AllDiffPolarity.filter.median <- as.data.frame(AllDiffPolarity.filter.median)
  colnames(AllDiffPolarity.filter.median) <- "polarity"
  AllDiffPolarity.filter.median$Condition <- rownames(AllDiffPolarity.filter.median)
  AllDiffPolarity.filter.median <- AllDiffPolarity.filter.median[order(AllDiffPolarity.filter.median$polarity),]
  
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
  
AllDiffPolarity.filter.median$Condition <- factor(AllDiffPolarity.filter.median$Condition,levels = unique(AllDiffPolarity.filter.median$Condition))
AllDiffPolarity.filter.median$Cells <- SampleInfo[match(AllDiffPolarity.filter.median$Condition,SampleInfo$TranscriptID),4]
AllDiffPolarity.filter.median$BreastCancers <- "N"
AllDiffPolarity.filter.median[which(AllDiffPolarity.filter.median$Cells%in%c("Hs578t","MCF7","MDA-MB-231","MDAMB231","SUM159PT","T47D","ZR75-1")),4] <- "Y"
AllDiffPolarity.filter.median$BreastCancers <- factor(AllDiffPolarity.filter.median$BreastCancers,levels = c("Y","N"))
p <- ggplot(data = AllDiffPolarity.filter.median, aes(x = Condition, y = polarity, fill = BreastCancers)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(0.7)) + labs(x="Condition",y="Diff(Polarity)") + scale_fill_manual(values = c("Y" = "#ee6169", "N" = "#5e9bd3"))+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 1, hjust=1),  # Codon 旋转 90 度（180 会倒着看）
    legend.position = "top"  # 如果你不想显示图例
  )+ylim(-0.2,0.2)

ggsave("allPolarity_filter_median_barplot.pdf",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)
ggsave("allPolarity_filter_median_barplot.png",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)


p <- ggplot(data = AllDiffPolarity.filter.median, aes(x = Condition, y = polarity)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black",fill="#5e9bd3", size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(0.7)) + labs(x="Condition",y="Diff(Polarity)") +# scale_fill_manual(values = c("Y" = "#ee6169", "N" = "#5e9bd3"))+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 1, hjust=1),  # Codon 旋转 90 度（180 会倒着看）
    legend.position = "top"  # 如果你不想显示图例
  )+ylim(-0.2,0.2)

ggsave("allPolarity_filter_median_barplot_noColor.pdf",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)
ggsave("allPolarity_filter_median_barplot_noColor.png",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)
```
