```{r}
AllDiffPolarity.filter.median$Condition <- factor(AllDiffPolarity.filter.median$Condition,levels = colnames(z1_ordered))
p <- ggplot(data = AllDiffPolarity.filter.median, aes(x = Condition, y = polarity, fill = BreastCancers)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(0.7)) + labs(x="Condition",y="Diff(Polarity)") + scale_fill_manual(values = c("Y" = "#ee6169", "N" = "#5e9bd3"))+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 1, hjust=1),  # Codon 旋转 90 度（180 会倒着看）
    legend.position = "top"  # 如果你不想显示图例
  )+ylim(-0.2,0.2)

ggsave("allPolarity_filter_median_barplot_ordered.pdf",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)
ggsave("allPolarity_filter_median_barplot_ordered.png",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)


p <- ggplot(data = AllDiffPolarity.filter.median, aes(x = Condition, y = polarity)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black",fill="#5e9bd3", size = 0.5, position = position_dodge(0.7)) + labs(x="Condition",y="Diff(Polarity)") +#scale_fill_manual(values =  "#5e9bd3")+
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 1, hjust=1),  # Codon 旋转 90 度（180 会倒着看）
    legend.position = "top"  # 如果你不想显示图例
  )+ylim(-0.2,0.2)
ggsave("allPolarity_filter_median_barplot_ordered_noColor.pdf",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)
ggsave("allPolarity_filter_median_barplot_ordered_noColor.png",p,height=6.5,width=12.5)



```

## 18. SLC7A11
```{r}
all_sample_trans_level_log2FC <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_trans_level_CDS_RPKM_log2FC.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F,sep = "\t")
log2FC_samples_info <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_treatment_conditions_log2FC.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F,sep = "\t")
AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info <- log2FC_samples_info[which(log2FC_samples_info$Class%in%c("AA starvation","mTORC1 inhibitor","Serum starvation")),]
trans_info <- read.table("./SourceData/longest.transcripts.info.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,sep = "\t",check.names = F)
  
  
all_sample_trans_level_log2FC.cpoly <- all_sample_trans_level_log2FC
all_sample_trans_level_log2FC.cpoly["GeneName"] <- trans_info[match(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC.cpoly$transcript_id,trans_info$trans_id),5]

SLC7A11 <- all_sample_trans_level_log2FC.cpoly[which(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC.cpoly$GeneName=="SLC7A11"),]


library(dplyr)
library(reshape2)
library(ggpubr)
library(cowplot)
library(ggsci)


SLC7A11.melt <- melt(SLC7A11)
SLC7A11.melt["Class"] <- AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info[match(SLC7A11.melt$variable,AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info$SampleID),3]
SLC7A11.melt["BreastCancers"] <- AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info[match(SLC7A11.melt$variable,AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info$SampleID),6]

SLC7A11.melt.filter <- SLC7A11.melt[which(SLC7A11.melt$Class%in%c("mTORC1 inhibitor","AA starvation","Serum starvation")),]
SLC7A11.melt.filter["NewClass"] <- "None"
SLC7A11.melt.filter[SLC7A11.melt.filter$Class=="mTORC1 inhibitor",7] <- "mTORC1 inhibitor"
SLC7A11.melt.filter[which(SLC7A11.melt.filter$Class=="AA starvation"&SLC7A11.melt.filter$BreastCancers=="Y"),7] <- "BreastCancers:AA"
SLC7A11.melt.filter[which(SLC7A11.melt.filter$Class=="AA starvation"&SLC7A11.melt.filter$BreastCancers=="N"),7] <- "NonBreastCancers:AA"

SLC7A11.melt.filter[which(SLC7A11.melt.filter$Class=="Serum starvation"&SLC7A11.melt.filter$BreastCancers=="Y"),7] <- "BreastCancers:Serum"
SLC7A11.melt.filter[which(SLC7A11.melt.filter$Class=="Serum starvation"&SLC7A11.melt.filter$BreastCancers=="N"),7] <- "NonBreastCancers:Serum"



SLC7A11.melt.filter$NewClass <- factor(SLC7A11.melt.filter$NewClass,levels = c("mTORC1 inhibitor","BreastCancers:AA","NonBreastCancers:AA","BreastCancers:Serum","NonBreastCancers:Serum"))

myclor <- pal_d3("category20",alpha = 0.5)(3)

pp1 = ggplot(SLC7A11.melt.filter,aes(x=NewClass,y=value,fill=NewClass)) + #ggplot作图
  geom_boxplot()+stat_boxplot(geom="errorbar",lwd=0.5,width=0.2)+geom_jitter(shape = 21,aes(fill=NewClass),width = 0.25) +
    #stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", color="grey60") +
    theme_cowplot() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 16),axis.title = element_text(size = 16),legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 16),plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,size = 16,face = 'plain'),legend.position = "none") +
    labs(title = "SLC7A11",y='log2FC')+scale_fill_npg()+coord_flip()

  ###组间t检验分析
labely = max(SLC7A11.melt.filter$value)
compare_means(value ~ NewClass,  data = SLC7A11.melt.filter)
my_comparisons <- list(c("BreastCancers:AA", "mTORC1 inhibitor"),c("BreastCancers:AA","NonBreastCancers:AA"),c("mTORC1 inhibitor","NonBreastCancers:AA"),c("BreastCancers:Serum","NonBreastCancers:Serum"))
pp1 = pp1 + stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons,size = 8,method = "wilcox.test")


ggsave("SLC7A11_genes_RPF_log2FC_boxplot.pdf",pp1,width = 8.5,height = 6.5)
ggsave("SLC7A11_genes_RPF_log2FC_boxplot.png",pp1,width = 8.5,height = 6.5)
```

## 19. autophagy
```{r}
all_sample_trans_level_log2FC <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_trans_level_CDS_RPKM_log2FC.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F,sep = "\t")
log2FC_samples_info <- read.table("./SourceData/all_sample_treatment_conditions_log2FC.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,check.names = F,sep = "\t")
AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info <- log2FC_samples_info[which(log2FC_samples_info$Class%in%c("AA starvation","mTORC1 inhibitor","Serum starvation")),]
trans_info <- read.table("./SourceData/longest.transcripts.info.txt",header = T,stringsAsFactors = F,sep = "\t",check.names = F)

autophagyC_human <- data.frame(Symbol=c("NBR1","SQSTM1","TAX1BP1","NCOA4","MAP1LC3A","MAP1LC3B","BECN1","LAMP1","LAMP2","ULK1"))

autophagyC_human["transID"] <- trans_info[match(autophagyC_human$Symbol,trans_info$gene_name),2]
autophagyC_human <- na.omit(autophagyC_human)
autophagyC_human <- autophagyC_human[!duplicated(autophagyC_human$Symbol),]

all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy <- all_sample_trans_level_log2FC[match(autophagyC_human$transID,all_sample_trans_level_log2FC$transcript_id),c("transcript_id",AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info$SampleID)]
all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy <- na.omit(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy)

all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy["mean_log2FC"] <- apply(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy[,-1],1,mean)
all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy["number_log2FC_gt0"] <- apply(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy[,-1],1,function(x){sum(x==0)})

all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.filter <- all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy[which(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy$number_log2FC_gt0<(59/2)),]

library(gplots)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(circlize)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggplotify)
library(eoffice)
top_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(df=data.frame(SampleType=AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info$Class,
                                               CellLine=AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info$Cell_line,
                                               BreastCancers=AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info$BreastCancers),
                                 show_legend = T,show_annotation_name = T,
                                 annotation_legend_param = list(SampleType=list(title="SampleType",legend_direction="vertical"),
                                                                CellLine=list(title="CellLine"),
                                                                BreastCancers=list(title="BreastCancers")),
                                 col=list(BreastCancers=c("N"="grey80","Y"="black"),
                                          SampleType=c("mTORC1 inhibitor"="#E64B35FF",
                                                       "Myc"="#4DBBD5FF","AA starvation"="#00A087FF",
                                                       "Serum starvation"="#3C5488FF","MNK inhibitor"="#F39B7FFF","ER stress"="#8491B4FF")))


all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted <- all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.filter[,AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info$SampleID]
rownames(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted) <- all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.filter$transcript_id
rownames(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted) <- autophagyC_human[match(rownames(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted),autophagyC_human$transID),1]

z3<-Heatmap(
  as.matrix(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted),
  col = colorRamp2(c(-1,0,1), 
                   rev(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(5, "RdBu"))(3))),
  cluster_rows = T,
  cluster_columns = T,
  clustering_distance_columns = 'euclidean',
  clustering_method_columns ="ward.D2",
  clustering_distance_rows = 'euclidean',
  clustering_method_rows ="ward.D2",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),
  column_title = "Sample",row_title = "Gene",
  heatmap_legend_param = list(title="log2FC",legend_direction="vertical"),top_annotation = top_annotation)
z3.t <- as.ggplot(z3)

ggsave('11_autophagy_genes_RPF_log2FC.pdf',plot=z3.t,width=10.5,height=5.5)
ggsave('11_autophagy_genes_RPF_log2FC.png',plot=z3.t,width=10.5,height=5.5)
write.table(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted,"11_autophagy_genes_RPF_log2FC.txt",quote = F,row.names = T,col.names = T,sep = "\t")

library(dplyr)
library(reshape2)
library(ggpubr)
library(cowplot)
library(ggsci)

all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted["GeneName"] <- rownames(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted)
all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt <- melt(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted)
all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt["Class"] <- AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info[match(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt$variable,AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info$SampleID),3]
all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt["BreastCancers"] <- AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info[match(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt$variable,AA_starvation_log2FC_sample_info$SampleID),6]

all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter <- all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt[which(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt$Class%in%c("mTORC1 inhibitor","AA starvation","Serum starvation")),]
all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter["NewClass"] <- "None"
all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter[all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter$Class=="mTORC1 inhibitor",6] <- "mTORC1 inhibitor"
all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter[which(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter$Class=="AA starvation"&all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter$BreastCancers=="Y"),6] <- "BreastCancers:AA"
all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter[which(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter$Class=="AA starvation"&all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter$BreastCancers=="N"),6] <- "NonBreastCancers:AA"

all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter[which(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter$Class=="Serum starvation"&all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter$BreastCancers=="Y"),6] <- "BreastCancers:Serum"
all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter[which(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter$Class=="Serum starvation"&all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter$BreastCancers=="N"),6] <- "NonBreastCancers:Serum"



all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter$NewClass <- factor(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter$NewClass,levels = c("mTORC1 inhibitor","BreastCancers:AA","NonBreastCancers:AA","BreastCancers:Serum","NonBreastCancers:Serum"))

myclor <- pal_d3("category20",alpha = 0.5)(3)

pp1 = ggplot(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter,aes(x=NewClass,y=value,fill=NewClass)) + #ggplot作图
  geom_boxplot()+stat_boxplot(geom="errorbar",lwd=0.5,width=0.2)+geom_jitter(shape = 21,aes(fill=NewClass),width = 0.25) +
    #stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", color="grey60") +
    theme_cowplot() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 16),axis.title = element_text(size = 16),legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 16),plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,size = 16,face = 'plain'),legend.position = "none") +
    labs(title = "Autophagy genes",y='log2FC')+scale_fill_npg()+coord_flip()

  ###组间t检验分析
labely = max(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter$value)
compare_means(value ~ NewClass,  data = all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter)
my_comparisons <- list(c("BreastCancers:AA", "mTORC1 inhibitor"),c("BreastCancers:AA","NonBreastCancers:AA"),c("mTORC1 inhibitor","NonBreastCancers:AA"),c("BreastCancers:Serum","NonBreastCancers:Serum"))
pp1 = pp1 + stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons,size = 8,method = "wilcox.test")

ggsave("11_autophagy_genes_RPF_log2FC_boxplot.pdf",pp1,width = 8.5,height = 6.5)
ggsave("11_autophagy_genes_RPF_log2FC_boxplot.png",pp1,width = 8.5,height = 6.5)




pp2 = ggplot(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter,aes(x=NewClass,y=value,fill=NewClass)) + #ggplot作图
  geom_boxplot()+stat_boxplot(geom="errorbar",lwd=0.5,width=0.2)+geom_jitter(shape = 21,aes(fill=NewClass),width = 0.25) +
    #stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", color="grey60") +
    theme_cowplot() +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 16),axis.title = element_text(size = 16),legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 16),plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,size = 16,face = 'plain'),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),axis.text.x = element_blank()) +
    labs(title = "Autophagy genes",y='log2FC',x="")+scale_fill_npg()+facet_wrap(~GeneName)

  ###组间t检验分析
labely = max(all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter$value)
compare_means(value ~ NewClass,  data = all_sample_trans_level_log2FC_autophagy.sorted.melt.filter)
my_comparisons <- list(c("BreastCancers:AA", "mTORC1 inhibitor"),c("BreastCancers:AA","NonBreastCancers:AA"),c("mTORC1 inhibitor","NonBreastCancers:AA"),c("BreastCancers:Serum","NonBreastCancers:Serum"))
pp2 = pp2 + stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons,size = 3,method = "wilcox.test")

ggsave("11_autophagy_genes_RPF_log2FC_boxplot2.pdf",pp2,width = 16,height = 12)
ggsave("11_autophagy_genes_RPF_log2FC_boxplot2.png",pp2,width = 16,height = 12)


```
